title: Urgent Opening Teacher at S.Chand Group Capital India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at S.Chand Group Capital India
jsonLd.description:
S.Chand Group Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About S.Chand Group Capital India:
S.Chand Group Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.Chand Group Capital India!
